SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?winner ?label WHERE {
  ?event wdt:P31 wd:Q1366197 ; wdt:P585 ?date ; wdt:P1346 ?winner .
  FILTER(YEAR(?date) = 2017)
  OPTIONAL {
    ?winner rdfs:label ?label
    FILTER(LANG(?label) = 'en')
  }
}
```

- "fuzzy": Retrieves items by overlap between their label words and the query keywords. The query keywords must not match label words exactly, but some fuzziness is allowed. Top 10 property alternatives:
1. winner (wd:P1346 as wdt/p), also known as "1st place medalist", "awardee", "champ", "champion", "has winner", etc.:
  - winner of a competition or similar event, not to be used from ... qualified with "for work" (P1686)) nor for wars or battles
2. participating team (wd:P1923 as wdt/p, matched via "teams"), also known as "teams":
  - like 'Participant' (P710) but for teams. For an event like a ... of sports team' (P54) as a qualifier for the individuals)
3. sport (wd:P641 as wdt/p), also known as "play", "plays", "sport played", "sports":
  - sport that the subject participates or participated in or is associated with
4. part of (wd:P361 as wdt/p, matched via "of"), also known as "assembly of", "branch of", "chain", "collateral branch of", "component of", etc.:
  - object of which the subject is a part (if this subject is ... "has part" (P527, see also "has parts of the class" (P2670))
5. has part(s) (wd:P527 as wdt/p, matched via "contain"), also known as "amalgamation of", "assembled from", "assembled out of", "composed of", "comprised of", etc.:
  - part of this subject; inverse property of "part of" (P361). See also "has parts of the class" (P2670).
6. inception (wd:P571 as wdt/p, matched via "formation"), also known as "built", "commenced on date", "commencement date", "completed", "composed", etc.:
  - time when an entity begins to exist; for date of official opening use P1619
7. parent organization or unit (wd:P749 as wdt/p, matched via "holding"), also known as "chapter of", "has organizational parent", "holding", "holding company", "owned by (company or organisation)", etc.:
  - parent organization or unit of an organization or unit, ... organization (Q43229) and organization unit (Q10387680)
8. country (wd:P17 as wdt/p, matched via "state"), also known as "host country", "land", "sovereign state", "state":
  - sovereign state that this item is in (not to be used for human beings)
9. topic's main category (wd:P910 as wdt/p, matched via "category"), also known as "article's main category", "category", "category for this topic", "catmain", "has category", etc.:
  - main Wikimedia category
10. follows (wd:P155 as wdt/p, matched via "succeeds"), also known as "before was", "comes after", "is after", "preceded by", "predecessor", etc.:
  - immediately prior item in a series of which the subject is a ... item, e.g. political offices, use "replaces" (P1365)]
